title: campylospermum obtusifolium var. angulatum
intro: Campylospermum obtusifolium var. angulatum is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the sandpaper tree due to its rough bark. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campylospermum obtusifolium var. angulatum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. Campylospermum obtusifolium var. angulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its bark can be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
